name: revit_export_element_images
description: Exports PNG images of selected elements from multiple 3D view angles (Isometric, North, East, Top).

element_ids.description: Element ids of the elements to export

output_dir.description: Directory for exported PNG files; defaults to %TEMP%\GetElementImage

notes: Current implementation uses interactive element pick or pre-selection. Temporary 3D views are rolled back after export. Refactor to accept element_ids and output_dir for headless MCP execution.
